records.question: Which documents have section sequence 4964 and have been accessed at most 5924 times?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_structures ON documents.document_structure_code = document_structures.document_structure_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE document_sections.section_sequence = 4964 AND documents.access_count <= 5924
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Documents.document_code 
FROM Documents 
JOIN Document_Sections ON Documents.document_code = Document_Sections.document_code 
WHERE Document_Sections.section_sequence = 4964 AND Documents.access_count <= 5924

records.question: Which documents named Learning Japanese have a section titled after with section sequence exactly 6349, where the access count is at most 2910 and the parent document structure code is exactly 8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_structures ON documents.document_structure_code = document_structures.document_structure_code
JOIN document_functional_areas ON documents.document_code = document_functional_areas.document_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE document_sections.section_sequence = 6349 AND documents.access_count <= 2910 AND document_structures.parent_document_structure_code = '8' AND documents.document_name = 'Learning Japanese' AND document_sections.section_title = 'after'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code 
FROM Documents 
JOIN Document_Sections ON Documents.document_code = Document_Sections.document_code 
WHERE Documents.document_name = 'Learning Japanese' 
AND Document_Sections.section_title = 'after' 
AND Document_Sections.section_sequence = 6349 
AND Documents.access_count <= 2910 
AND Documents.document_structure_code = '8'

records.question: Which documents named John CV with type CV have at most 5924 accesses, include a section titled after with sequence 8548 and code 49, and belong to an Author section whose parent document structure code is 8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_structures ON documents.document_structure_code = document_structures.document_structure_code
JOIN document_functional_areas ON documents.document_code = document_functional_areas.document_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE document_sections.section_title = 'after' AND document_structures.parent_document_structure_code = '8' AND document_sections.section_sequence = 8548 AND document_structures.document_structure_description = 'Author section' AND documents.document_name = 'John CV' AND documents.document_type_code = 'CV' AND documents.access_count <= 5924 AND document_sections.section_code = '49'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code
FROM Documents
JOIN Document_Sections ON Documents.document_code = Document_Sections.document_code
JOIN Document_Structures ON Documents.document_structure_code = Document_Structures.document_structure_code
WHERE Documents.document_name = 'John CV'
  AND Documents.document_type_code = 'CV'
  AND Documents.access_count <= 5924
  AND Document_Sections.section_title = 'after'
  AND Document_Sections.section_sequence = 8548
  AND Document_Sections.section_code = '49'
  AND Document_Structures.parent_document_structure_code = '8'

records.question: Which books have an author section and contain content where the section code is exactly 22?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_structures ON documents.document_structure_code = document_structures.document_structure_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE document_sections.section_code = '22' AND documents.document_type_code = 'Book' AND document_structures.document_structure_description = 'Author section'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code 
FROM Documents 
JOIN Document_Sections ON Documents.document_code = Document_Sections.document_code 
WHERE Document_Sections.section_code = '22'

records.question: Which documents named John CV have an Author section with parent structure code 8, access count at most 5924, and include section code 93 with sequence number at most 4964?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
JOIN document_structures ON documents.document_structure_code = document_structures.document_structure_code
JOIN document_sections ON documents.document_code = document_sections.document_code
WHERE document_structures.parent_document_structure_code = '8' AND documents.document_name = 'John CV' AND documents.access_count <= 5924 AND document_structures.document_structure_description = 'Author section' AND document_sections.section_sequence <= 4964 AND document_sections.section_code = '93'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code
FROM Documents documents
JOIN Document_Sections sections ON documents.document_code = sections.document_code
WHERE documents.document_name = 'John CV'
  AND sections.section_code = '93'
  AND sections.section_sequence <= 4964
  AND documents.access_count <= 5924
  AND documents.document_structure_code IN (
      SELECT document_structure_code
      FROM Document_Structures
      WHERE parent_document_structure_code = '8'
  )

records.question: What documents named David CV have a type of CV and have been accessed at most 6345 times?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_code FROM documents
WHERE documents.access_count <= 6345 AND documents.document_type_code = 'CV' AND documents.document_name = 'David CV'
records.pred_sql: SELECT documents.document_code FROM Documents documents WHERE documents.document_name = 'David CV' AND documents.document_type_code = 'CV' AND documents.access_count <= 6345
